eventstream.note: EventStream tab completely empty — 0 events received

response.note: Status 200 OK returned instead of expected 422. SSE stream opened but 0 events parsed.

ui_result.outline_quality: incomplete — only 1 card with content '1', no real outline generated
ui_result.note: Gamma attempted outline generation but produced only 1 empty card. No APF warning text shown.

console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

diagnosis.observation: Build #21 intended to return 422 + JSON error body, but actual status was 200 OK. EventStream shows 0 events — SSE stream opened but no data received. Gamma's frontend caught the error internally and logged 'Unable to complete request' to console. UI produced a degenerate outline (1 card, content='1') rather than showing an error message to the user.
possible_causes: Build #21 may not have been deployed to the test server yet
422 status code may have been converted back to 200 by Etap proxy before reaching Gamma's CDN
SSE content-type header still set, causing 200 status with empty SSE body
Gamma's error handling catches the incomplete SSE and generates a minimal outline fallback
diagnosis.conclusion: The 422 JSON error approach was NOT observed for Gamma either. Status was 200 with 0 EventStream events. Console shows 'Unable to complete request' error but UI did not display any warning text to the user. Same pattern as Copilot (#038) — SSE stream opened with 200 OK but no events delivered. Need to verify Build #21 deployment status on Etap server.
